/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/EchoServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/Epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/InetAddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/зЅ‘з»њжЎ†жћ¶/src/main.cpp.o -o echo_server  -lpthread
